examples: So let us recommit ourselves to this cause.
Recommit to doing the work that is necessary for you and your future partner.
Recommit yourself to doing all of the positive things you did to keep the lines of communication open and the relationships going.
This month, we recommit to keeping our streets safe, our families healthy, and our communities strong.
Let us remember their courage in the face of danger, and recommit ourselves to the journey ahead.
